properties.name: Ang Sila oyster farming
properties.nameTh: เลี้ยงหอยนางรม อ่างศิลา
properties.describe: Concentrated oyster-rope farming in shallow bay. Vulnerable to SST > 32°C and freshwater dilution from monsoon runoff.

properties.name: Bang Saen shrimp ponds
properties.nameTh: นากุ้ง บางแสน
properties.describe: Coastal aquaculture ponds. Critically sensitive to flood inundation (saltwater overflow into ponds) and disease outbreaks during heatwaves.

properties.name: Chonburi Bay artisanal fishing
properties.nameTh: พื้นที่ประมงพื้นบ้าน อ่าวชลบุรี
properties.describe: Small-boat traditional fishing zone (< 5 km offshore). Households depend on daily catches; weather window matters more than seasonal totals.

properties.name: Bang Phra mussel + shrimp
properties.nameTh: หอยและกุ้ง บางพระ
properties.describe: Mussel ropes + shrimp cages mixed-use zone. Famous for oysters from Bang Phra reservoir outflow waters.

properties.name: Koh Si Chang offshore fishing
properties.nameTh: ประมง เกาะสีชัง
properties.describe: Mid-water gill nets and squid jigging around Si Chang island. Larger commercial boats — wave threshold for safety is higher (~2.5 m).
